features: User Authentication: Allow users to create accounts, log in, and manage their profiles with options for password recovery and social media sign-in.
Product Catalog: Display a grid of products with filtering options (by category, price, rating) and sorting options (by popularity, newest, price low to high).
Product Detail Page: Each product has a dedicated page with high-resolution images, detailed descriptions, customer reviews, and related products.
Shopping Cart: Users can add items to their cart, view a summary of selected products, and modify quantities or remove items. Include a persistent cart feature that saves items for logged-in users.
Checkout Process: A multi-step checkout flow that includes shipping information, payment options (credit card, PayPal, etc.), and order summary. Provide a progress indicator for users.
Order Confirmation: After checkout, users receive a confirmation page with order details and an email notification. Include estimated delivery times and tracking information.
Wishlist: Users can save products to a wishlist for future purchases. Include options to share the wishlist with friends or family.
Search Functionality: Implement a search bar with auto-suggestions and filters to help users find products quickly.
User Reviews and Ratings: Allow customers to leave reviews and rate products. Include moderation features to manage inappropriate content.
Responsive Design: Ensure the website is fully responsive and optimized for mobile devices, providing a seamless shopping experience across all screen sizes.
Loading States: Implement loading animations for product pages and checkout processes to enhance user experience during data fetching.
Empty States: Provide friendly messages and suggestions when users have empty carts or wishlists, encouraging them to explore products.
Feedback Mechanisms: Include feedback options for users to report issues or suggest improvements, with acknowledgment messages for submitted feedback.
Order History: Users can view their past orders, including details like order status, items purchased, and re-order options.
Multi-page Navigation: Create a clear navigation structure with categories, subcategories, and a breadcrumb trail to help users easily navigate back to previous pages.
Promotional Banners: Display seasonal promotions, discounts, or new arrivals on the homepage with clickable banners that lead to relevant product pages.
Live Chat Support: Integrate a live chat feature for real-time customer support, with options for users to leave messages if agents are unavailable.
Payment Security: Highlight security features during the checkout process, such as SSL certificates and secure payment gateways, to build trust with users.
Accessibility Features: Ensure the website is accessible to users with disabilities, including keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, and adjustable text sizes.
